title: It is + adj. + for/of sb. + to V
formula_for_zh: 做某事（對某人來說）是⋯⋯的
formula_of_zh: 某人做某事是⋯⋯的（評價人格特質）

explanation.for: for 用於描述某件事對某人而言的難易度、重要性或必要性，著重於「事情本身的性質」。形容詞描述的是不定詞所代表的動作，而非 for 後面的人。
explanation.of: of 用於描述某人做了某件事所展現出的品格或特質，著重於「人的特質」。形容詞直接描述 of 後面那個人的個人特質或行為表現。

examples.sentence: It is important for students to review their notes every day.
examples.template: It is ___ for students to review their notes every day.
parts: for students to review their notes every day.
examples.translation: 學生每天複習筆記是很重要的。

examples.sentence: It is difficult for beginners to master a new language quickly.
examples.template: It is ___ for beginners to master a new language quickly.
parts: for beginners to master a new language quickly.
examples.translation: 對初學者來說，快速精通一門新語言是很困難的。

examples.sentence: It is very kind of you to help me carry these heavy boxes.
examples.template: It is very ___ of you to help me carry these heavy boxes.
parts: of you to help me carry these heavy boxes.
examples.translation: 你幫我搬這些重箱子真的很好心。

examples.sentence: It is careless of Tom to forget his umbrella on such a rainy day.
examples.template: It is ___ of Tom to forget his umbrella on such a rainy day.
parts: of Tom to forget his umbrella on such a rainy day.
examples.translation: Tom 在這麼下雨的天氣還忘記帶傘，真的很粗心。

extension.title: 延伸學習：判斷用 for 還是 of
extension.tip: 判斷技巧：把形容詞套用到人身上。如果句子合理，就用 of；如果不合理，就用 for。

examples.result: → 用 of：It is kind of him to do that.
→ 用 for：It is important for him to do that.

extension.note: 口訣：形容詞若能直接描述「人」的特質，用 of；若描述的是「事情」的性質，用 for。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的句型填空，表示做某事的必要性
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is necessary _______ students to submit their assignments on time.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「for」。當形容詞修飾事物的必要性、困難度等客觀特徵時，使用「It is + adj. + for + sb.」。本句「對學生來說提交作業很必要」，用「necessary for students」。B項「of」用於描述人的品質（如honest of you），不符合。C、D項不合文法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷應使用 for 或 of 來完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: It was kind _______ you to help me move to my new apartment yesterday.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B「of」。當形容詞描述人的品質特徵（如kind、nice、foolish、brave）時，使用「It is + adj. + of + sb.」。本句「你很親切地幫我」，強調你的人格特質，應用「kind of you」。A項「for」用於客觀條件，不符合此情境。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當介詞並理解 for/of 的使用區別
mc_exercises.question_eng: It is difficult _______ him to concentrate on his work when there is so much noise in the office.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B「for」。形容詞「difficult」描述事情的客觀困難程度，而非人的品質，應使用「It is + adj. + for + sb.」。句意「對他來說在嘈雜辦公室集中注意力很困難」，用「difficult for him」。A項「of」用於人的品質，不適合此語境。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 綜合題：判斷多個選項並理解複雜句式結構
mc_exercises.question_eng: It would be foolish _______ anyone to ignore the environmental warnings, yet it is also unrealistic _______ us to expect immediate change from all industries.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「of; for」。第一句「foolish of anyone」描述人的行為特性（愚蠢是人的品質），用「of」。第二句「unrealistic for us」描述期待這件事的客觀不現實性（條件特徵），用「for」。此題考查考生對兩個介詞細微差別的理解能力，難度較高。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 對學生來說，每天早起上學是困難的。
translation_exercises.answer: It is difficult for students to get up early and go to school every day.
hints: 使用 for 表示事情對某人的難易度，著重於『事情本身』的性質
注意：形容詞 difficult 修飾的是不定詞 to get up，而非 students

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 你很勇敢，敢在全班面前發表意見。
translation_exercises.answer: It is brave of you to express your opinion in front of the whole class.
key_points: of 用於描述人的特質
hints: 使用 of 表示某人做了某事所展現出的品格或特質，著重於『人的特質』
注意：形容詞 brave 直接描述 of 後面的『you』的個人特質，而非事情本身

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 對我們高三學生來說，在繁忙的課業中保持身體健康是非常重要的。
translation_exercises.answer: It is very important for us senior high school students to maintain our physical health amid heavy schoolwork.
key_points: It is + very important + for us
hints: 使用 for 強調『保持健康』這件事對學生的重要性，焦點在『事情』而非『人』
注意：不能改用 of，因為 important 修飾的是動作（maintain），而非人的品格

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 小王很自私，竟然在小組專題中只顧自己的分數，不幫助其他組員。
translation_exercises.answer: It is selfish of Xiaowang to only care about his own grade in the group project and not help other team members.
key_points: to only care about his own grade
selfish 描述人的道德特質
hints: 使用 of 因為 selfish 直接評價 Xiaowang 這個『人』的品格缺陷，著重於『人的特質』
注意：此處不能用 for，因為句子重點是『小王的自私行為』而非『事情的難易度』；不定詞可以包含多個動作（to care and not help）
